question: What are your opening hours?
answer:
Our opening hours:
• Mon – Fri: 9am – 8pm
• Saturday: 9am – 7pm
• Sunday: 10am – 6pm

Would you like to book an appointment?

question: Where are you located?
answer: Elite Saloon is at 123 Glamour Avenue, Suite 200, New York, NY 10001. Paid street parking is available on Glamour Avenue, and there is a parking garage on 5th Street about 1 block away.

question: What services do you offer?
answer:
Our services:
• Haircut & Style — from $35
• Beard Trim & Shape — from $20
• Hair & Beard Combo — from $50
• Hot Towel Shave — $40
• Hair Color & Highlights — from $65
• Scalp Treatment — from $45
• Full Works — $75

See the full menu at our services page or ask me about any specific service.

question: How do I book an appointment?
answer: You can book directly through this chat, by calling (212) 555-0100, or by emailing hello@elitesaloon.com. Online booking is available for Adrian via his personal Calendly link.

question: How much does a haircut cost?
answer: A classic haircut starts from $35. Fades start at $40. A full Hair & Beard Combo is $50. The Full Works (haircut, beard, hot towel, scalp massage) is $75.

question: How much does a beard trim cost?
answer: A beard trim and shape starts from $20. A full beard sculpt/design is $28. Add a beard conditioning oil treatment for $10.

question: Do you offer hot towel shaves?
answer: Yes — our Hot Towel Straight Razor Shave ($40) is one of our most popular services. It includes a hot towel prep, premium lather, and straight razor finish for the closest shave possible.

question: Who are your barbers?
answer:
Meet our team:
• Adrian — Master Barber (10 years)
• Marcus — Senior Barber (8 years)
• Alex R. — Color Specialist (7 years)
• Dean K. — Grooming Specialist (6 years)

Would you like to book with a specific barber?

question: Can I choose my barber?
answer: Absolutely. You can request a specific barber when booking. Adrian is bookable online via his Calendly link. For Marcus, Alex, or Dean, chat with us here, call (212) 555-0100, or email hello@elitesaloon.com.

question: What does Adrian specialise in?
answer: Adrian is our Master Barber with 10 years of experience. He specialises in Precision Fades, Beard Sculpting, Classic Cuts, and Hot Towel Shaves.

question: What does Marcus specialise in?
answer: Marcus is our Senior Barber with 8 years of experience. He specialises in Textured Cuts, Line-Ups, Hair & Beard Combos, and Skin Fades.

question: What does Alex specialise in?
answer: Alex R. is our Color Specialist with 7 years of experience. He specialises in Hair Color, Grey Blending, Highlights, and Balayage.

question: What does Dean specialise in?
answer: Dean K. is our Grooming Specialist with 6 years of experience. He specialises in Hot Towel Shaves, Beard Sculpting, Scalp Treatments, and Straight Razor shaving.

question: Do you do hair color?
answer: Yes — Alex R. is our dedicated Color Specialist. Single process color from $65, partial highlights from $80, full highlights from $110, grey blending from $70, and toner/gloss from $35.

question: How do I cancel or reschedule?
answer: Please cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours in advance. If you booked via Calendly, use the reschedule link in your confirmation email. Otherwise call (212) 555-0100 or email hello@elitesaloon.com.

question: Do you accept walk-ins?
answer: We do accept walk-ins based on availability, but we always recommend booking in advance — especially on weekends — to guarantee your preferred barber and time.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and cash. Tips can be added to card payments.

question: Do you sell gift cards?
answer: Yes! Gift cards are available in any amount, perfect for any occasion. Purchase in-salon or call us at (212) 555-0100.

question: What products do you use?
answer: We use premium grooming product lines. Our own branded products — Elite Saloon Shampoo, Beard Oil, and Matte Paste — are also available to purchase in-salon.

question: What should I expect on my first visit?
answer: Arrive 5 minutes early. Your barber will start with a quick consultation to understand your style preferences. Sit back, relax, and enjoy the experience — most visits include a complimentary beverage. You'll leave looking and feeling sharp.

question: How long do services take?
answer:
Approximate service durations:
• Classic Haircut: ~45 min
• Fade: ~45 min
• Beard Trim: ~20 min
• Hair & Beard Combo: ~60 min
• Hot Towel Shave: ~45 min
• Full Works: ~90 min
• Color services: 60 – 180 min

question: What is your tipping policy?
answer: Tipping is always appreciated but never required. You can add a tip to any card payment. A standard tip is 15–20% of the service total.

question: What if I am running late?
answer: Please call us at (212) 555-0100 if you're running late. We hold your slot for up to 10 minutes. After that, we may need to reschedule to avoid delays for other clients.

question: Do you cut women's hair?
answer: Elite Saloon specialises in men's grooming and barbershop services. We do not currently offer women's hair services.

question: Do you cut children's hair?
answer: Yes, we offer children's cuts (under 12) for $25. We recommend booking in advance and arriving a few minutes early to help your child settle in.

question: Do you offer group or corporate bookings?
answer: Yes — we can accommodate group bookings for events, weddings, or corporate grooming. Please call (212) 555-0100 or email hello@elitesaloon.com to arrange.

question: Is there parking nearby?
answer: Yes — paid street parking on Glamour Avenue, and a parking garage on 5th Street about 1 block from us.
